text_block_list.text:
Today is the first day of summer camp. It's a
period of intense training where racers can
improve their skills.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Current temperature—twenty-eight degrees
Celsius. Relative humidity—seventy-eight
percent. This is an average summer day in July.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The heat is expected to grow more intense in the
coming days. Please take adequate precautions
against heatstroke.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, Trainer. We must ensure that we hydrate
periodically.

Mihono Bourbon takes out a water bottle from
somewhere and hands it to me.

And so begins my blistering summer camp with
Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: After summer, it'll be time for the Kikuka Sho...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You can do this, Rice... Come on!
